text:
Posting here because you may not be looking yourself, but may know someone that could be good for this position - if so, please pass on the information and encourage them to apply!

There is an opening at WU (Vienna) for a tenure track position in statistical computing, see:
<https://wirtschaftsuniversitaet-wien-portal.rexx-systems.com/Assistant-Professor-tenure-track-qualification-agreement-eng-j2682.html>

This is where R Core member Kurt Hornik is currently department chair and he would welcome applications from people who could eventually make substantial contributions to the R ecosystem, including base R itself.

The opportunity is for people that are about to complete their PhD or have done so not too long ago. The deadline is Mar 18!
